programmes.show_description: ...Reunion Special: Brand new - Revelations and a fiery showdown are served as the class of 2025 reunite at an explosive dinner party.
Hungry-for-love teens take their first steps into the land of real-world dating - including a poet, a builder, and a young man with a pet tarantula.
Rex continues to explore his identity as secrets threaten to spill at the joint engagement party. Gemma faces a painful revelation. And Mercedes returns from rehab with a shocking proposal.
On the day of the joint engagement party, secrets threaten to spill, while Rex struggles with his truth. Gemma faces a painful revelation, and Sienna makes a shocking discovery.
Mercedes returns from rehab with a shocking proposal. Sienna and Myra fight to keep baby Joseph in the village. Ste eagerly plans a holiday with Rex.
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.
Bazzini: Award-winning chef Paul runs Italian joint Bazzini in New Jersey, but didn't realise how difficult running a restaurant would be. Can Gordon turn it around?
Mojito: Gordon Ramsay visits a Cuban café in Brooklyn, where owners Marcelo and Kata fight over everything, driving away customers with their high-volume bickering.
MTV Spring Break: Hoping to enjoy a genuine spring break experience, Erica and Barry pay a visit to Pops in Florida, but the jaunt isn't what they expected.
Flashy Little Flashdancer: Beverly takes up dancing. The kids are not impressed. Adam attempts to act cooler than Emmy's handsome new date.
We Need to Talk About Lily: Phil thinks he's found Pepper's dream home. Mitch and Cam get invited to an exclusive event.
SuperShowerBabyBowl: Jay is hosting a Super Bowl party, while Claire hosts a baby shower for Haley - and they're both at Jay's house. What could possibly go wrong?
PJ's Steakhouse: In New York, Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse, where owners Joe and Madalyn are in serious debt and struggling to keep the high-end restaurant afloat.
Fleming: Gordon Ramsay visits Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. Once the best family-run restaurant in town, it's now losing money fast.
Coral Palms (Part 3/3): The team go on a road trip to help Peralta and Holt take down crime boss Jimmy Figgis but their plan is hindered by an unforeseen injury.
The Night Shift: Holt looks for ways to improve the team's morale, while Santiago is filled with curiosity when Diaz starts to take long breaks from her desk.
Lost Verizon: When Bart finds Denis Leary's phone and uses it to make prank calls and accept job offers, Denis comes up with a creative punishment for him.
A Tale of Two Springfields: When class rivalries split Springfield in two, Homer becomes mayor of 'New Springfield'.
Fiddler: Murray becomes an overzealous stage parent when he learns that Adam has no interest in auditioning for the school production of Fiddler on the Roof.
Bohemian Rap City: Beverly and Murray are worried about Adam's obsession with toys. Erica's band decide to audition for a TV talent show.
Snapped: Claire needs to clear the house before anyone makes her look bad in front of a reporter from an important women's business magazine. Jay invites Manny to a wine tasting.
Perfect Pairs: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love looking after the twins, but find it exhausting. But then they realise that the babies might be useful for their to-do lists...
The Audit: The squad panic when they learn that the precinct could be closed if they get a bad evaluation. And to make matters worse, their auditor's Amy's ex, Teddy.
Serve & Protect: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precinct's ongoing evaluation as a new auditor takes over.
Worst Episode Ever: Bart and Milhouse end up running Comic Book Guy's shop after he has a heart attack. And, while he recovers, Comic Book Guy falls in love...
Tennis the Menace: Homer builds a tennis court in the back garden but becomes jealous of Bart's tennis skills and swears revenge at the Krusty Klassic tournament.
Vicky's still on edge after recent events. Sienna makes a tough decision. And a resident is faced with the truth...

programmes.show_name: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
programmes.show_description: It's bite at first sight in an iconic union, as culinary competitiveness meets marriage mayhem! Will Emma Barnes' wedding-inspired menu be a match made in heaven? (Ep1/5)
for Stand Up To Cancer: Kelly Brook, Mo Gilligan, Carol Vorderman and Rob Rinder tackle signature sandwich biscuits, iced buns, and a cake showstopper revealing their guilty pleasure!
The Goggleboxers watch Strictly Come Dancing, Our Dementia Choir Sings Again with Vicky McClure, My Possessed Pet, This Morning and The Ex-Wife.
On the box this time: I Can See Your Voice, Emmerdale, Strictly, Unbreakable, The Ex-Wife, Bargain Hunt, and the News on Jeremy Hunt becoming 2022's fourth Chancellor.
Paul is desperate to find love but worries that nerves make his stammer worse. And do chat-up lines work?
...Bits: We celebrate the pickers whose initial naked attraction led to full-on romance, as well as those whose dates were disasters.
The Goggleboxers watch Strictly Come Dancing, Our Dementia Choir Sings Again with Vicky McClure, My Possessed Pet, This Morning and The Ex-Wife.
On the box this time: I Can See Your Voice, Emmerdale, Strictly, Unbreakable, The Ex-Wife, Bargain Hunt, and the News on Jeremy Hunt becoming 2022's fourth Chancellor.
The Audit: The squad panic when they learn that the precinct could be closed if they get a bad evaluation. And to make matters worse, their auditor's Amy's ex, Teddy.
Serve & Protect: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precinct's ongoing evaluation as a new auditor takes over.
Have a Summer: Adam worries about being hazed by the older students when he goes to high school, but he soon earns their respect by body-slamming Barry.
Breakfast Club: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school, while Beverly gets her teaching certificate.
Couples from Don't Tell the Bride look back on their unconventional big days. In this episode, Ellis and Luke remember their rave-themed wedding from 2013. (Ep1)
Mercedes returns from rehab with a shocking proposal. Sienna and Myra fight to keep baby Joseph in the village. Ste eagerly plans a holiday with Rex.
Vicky's still on edge after recent events. Sienna makes a tough decision. And a resident is faced with the truth...
A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.
PJ's Steakhouse: In New York, Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse, where owners Joe and Madalyn are in serious debt and struggling to keep the high-end restaurant afloat.
Fleming: Gordon Ramsay visits Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. Once the best family-run restaurant in town, it's now losing money fast.
The Opportunity of a Lifetime: Barry gets the chance to throw the first pitch at a Phillies baseball game. Erica makes an important decision about her future.
Spaceballs: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after watching the movie Spaceballs. Erica plans to tell Beverly and Pops about a big decision she's made.
Red Alert: Lily has reached a womanly milestone that Cam and Mitch are not at all prepared for. So they call in reinforcements...
The Wild: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jay's annual hiking trip to find an elusive bald eagle. And Gloria, Alex, Claire and Haley get together to plan a baby shower.
Sushi Ko: Akira and Lisa are losing up to $20,000 a month at their sushi restaurant in California. Can Gordon piece the family back together and save the restaurant?
Lido Di Manhattan: Ambitious graduate Lisa bought her restaurant in California at just 23 but, five years later, she's worried she picked the wrong venture. Can Gordon help?
Halloween IV: It's Halloween, so the squad follow precinct tradition and compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius.
Monster in the Closet: When Pimento and Diaz decide to tie the knot, the squad try to prepare the perfect wedding under Santiago's careful direction.
Insane Clown Poppy: Homer and Bart take Lisa to a book fair, where Krusty meets his long-lost daughter (guest star Drew Barrymore). But it doesn't go well...
Lisa the Tree Hugger: A dramatic rooftop protest at Krusty Burger inspires Lisa to become an eco-radical - especially when she sees how cute one of the protestors is...
The Living Room: A 100% True Story: Barry's worried about Murray's health, so he asks his friends and Coach Mellor to help him get fit.
Bachelor Party: Barry thinks he wants a wild bachelor party, but when he's confronted with the reality, he realises that Adam's idea of a low-key event is more his speed.
Pool Party: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover that they have their own self-doubts.
The Last Halloween: Phil's determined to scare Claire on Halloween. And for the first time, Gloria is self-conscious about her age when someone correctly assumes she's Jay's wife.
The Last Ride: Peralta and Boyle go to extremes to catch a bike thief. Diaz soothes Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Santiago spends time with Holt.
Moo Moo: Jeffords wants to file a complaint against a fellow police officer who stops him in his own neighbourhood while he's off duty, but Holt has other ideas.
Day of the Jackanapes: Sideshow Bob swears revenge on Krusty for accidentally erasing the first 10 years of their programme.
New Kids on the Blecch: After cheating in the Springfield Marathon, Bart is rescued from an angry mob by a record producer and is recruited for a new boy band.
After months of torment and pain, Dodger finally has his chance to expose Sully for what he really is, but Sully's ready to fight dirty...

programmes.show_name: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
programmes.show_description: Canny lad Kieran Chapman hopes to tickle his guests' fancy with a clown-themed carnival of delights. But is serving dessert with chopsticks a joke too far? (Ep2/5)
...for Stand Up To Cancer: Daisy Ridley, Rob Beckett, Alexandra Burke and Tom Allen make millionaire's shortbread, a fruity tart and a showstopping cake of their pet hates.
The Goggleboxers have been watching Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Jamie's £1 Wonders, Top Gear, Guillermo del Toro's Cabinet of Curiosities, and Wild Croc Territory.
Will it be first love for inexperienced Ed and Purdey, and can Peter recover from an embarrassing faux pas?
This Pride special rides the rainbow and celebrates memorable singletons from across the sexual spectrum who've sashayed into the pods.
